failure_modes.mode: Inadequate mixing leading to reaction inefficiency
failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of TBAB/EG DES results in poor mass transfer
failure_modes.mitigation: Optimize flow rate and reactor design to enhance mixing efficiency

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at high temperatures
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure feed reservoir is pressurized adequately to prevent cavitation

failure_modes.cause: Solid formation or impurities in the DES leading to valve obstruction
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement regular maintenance and filtration of feed to prevent blockage

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Conduct flow tests at varying Q to assess mixing efficiency and reaction yield
Monitor pump performance under different temperature and pressure conditions to identify cavitation
Evaluate the impact of filtration on BPR valve blockage frequency
